expectations.text: Output is organized into distinct phases
expectations.evidence: 16 files organized as phase-1-*, phase-2-*, phase-3-*, phase-4-*, phase-5-*, phase-6-*
phase-1-discovery-report.md contains inventory of existing components, routing, state management
phase-2-design-specification.md (17KB) produced before any phase-3+ code files
Design spec includes ASCII diagram with Left Rail 260px, Center Content max-w 720px, Right Rail 280px
References Signal Cobalt, Arctic Steel, Linear, Gamma Dark across 5 files, with CSS token definitions

expectations.text: References specific layout IDs from registry
expectations.evidence: Uses nav-hub, two-col, stat-cards, hb-practices across 4 files

expectations.text: Defines progress tracking at multiple levels
expectations.evidence: CourseProgressBar component with coursePercent + modulePercent + moduleLabel; ProgressContext with course/module/lesson tracking
ThemeContext with getModuleTheme() cycling odd=dark/even=light, auto mode, user override
All code files are .tsx with proper React imports, TypeScript interfaces, token-driven styles
phase-6-audit-report.md covers WCAG AA, keyboard nav, aria labels, focus states, non-color-only indicators
